untranslatable_reason: Pattern requires comparative analysis between bear market vs bull market decline steepness. Available indicators cannot dynamically compare regime-specific decline rates. 'Bear market decline steeper than bull market decline' requires regime-relative volatility comparison not expressible with single-regime indicators. Entry uses proxy: price below SMA_200 (bear regime indicator), strong downtrend (ADX>25), and negative returns. Exit uses uptrend recovery signal. Actual pattern performance statistics (success_rate, avg_decline) are UNKNOWN, limiting optimization.
